gnomad.note: very rare but observed in gnomAD; not strictly absent so PM2 is debatable

insilico.note: approximate; predictors converge strongly on damaging

mavedb_function.note: BRCA1 BRCT-domain saturation genome editing; clear functional loss

literature.title: Accurate classification of BRCA1 variants with saturation genome editing.
literature.abstract: Findlay et al. report that p.Gly1706Glu disrupts BRCA1 function in saturation genome editing of HAP1 cells, consistent with prior HDR-deficient assays.

literature.title: Functional analysis of BRCT-domain BRCA1 missense variants in homology-directed repair.
literature.abstract: p.Gly1706Glu was scored as functionally deficient in HDR-based assays, supporting a pathogenic mechanism distinct from common polymorphisms in the same domain.

_ground_truth.note: Multiple labs and ENIGMA call LP based on convergent functional and computational evidence; population_first may withhold PM2 due to non-zero gnomAD count
